title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nucleus Software International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
